name: patterns-cc
description: Workflow pattern manager for Claude Code — lists, instantiates, and patches workflow patterns. Includes /patterns command and agent-monitoring pattern template.

scripts.postinstall:
echo '
  patterns-cc installed!
  Run: npx patterns-cc
  Or copy manually:
    cp commands/patterns.md ~/.claude/commands/
    cp patterns/agent-monitoring.md ~/.claude/patterns/
'
